Simple run script for the project architecture visualizer.

This is the main entry point that users should run to analyze their projects.

Enhanced Real-World Test Suite for Universal Project Architecture Visualizer

Major Upgrades:

1. Multi-project parallel testing
2. Advanced metrics & benchmarking
3. Regression testing with baselines
4. Memory profiling & leak detection
5. Comprehensive edge case coverage
6. CI/CD integration support
7. Detailed HTML reporting
8. Auto-discovery of test projects
9. Comparative analysis across languages
10. Stress testing for large codebases

Usage:

python test_real_world.py # Run all tests
python test_real_world.py --parallel 4 # Parallel execution
python test_real_world.py --profile # Memory profiling
python test_real_world.py --baseline # Create baseline
python test_real_world.py --compare # Compare with baseline
python test_real_world.py --stress # Stress test
python test_real_world.py --export-html # Generate HTML report
